content:
# Photocatalysis

**Summary**: The acceleration of a chemical reaction by a catalyst in the presence of light.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-muhyedeen|Muhyedeen, 2013]] evaluated photocatalysis as a method for degrading MTBE.

- [[2015-hassan|Hassan, 2015]] used organic dyes as photocatalysts for synthesis and degradation.

## Scientific Context

- [[2013-muhyedeen|Muhyedeen, 2013]] Primary mechanism for the degradation of organic pollutants in water.

- [[2015-hassan|Hassan, 2015]] used organic dyes as photocatalysts for synthesis and degradation.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- uv-photocatalysis

## Key Findings Across Sources

- TiO2 and carbon nanotubes provided an effective catalytic surface for MTBE breakdown. ([[2013-muhyedeen|Muhyedeen, 2013]])

- Organic dye photocatalyzed alpha-functionalization of tertiary amines was used as a model. ([[2015-hassan|Hassan, 2015, p. 21]])
